docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELLBER, PHILIP MACGUINNESS, ROSEMARY AS TO DEFENDANT HUMPHREY, JAMES R METRO REAL ESTATE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-22-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-26-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-02-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-23-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
